changelog: Brownfield adoption + memory FTS5 correctness. (1) NEW brownfield installer `.claude/core/install.js` (+ `domdhi-install` bin): copies `.claude/` into an existing repo with interactive per-conflict merge (keep/overwrite/diff), a headless keep-existing fallback that writes `.claude/MERGE-NOTES.md` and exits 0, do-not-ship excludes (agent-memory/skills-optional/agents-optional/settings.local.json/push-guardrail.json), scaffold delegation, and a git-safe never-auto-commit posture. Zero runtime deps; never runs `npm install`. `--force`/`--overwrite-all`/`--keep`/`--dry-run` supported. CRITICAL fix during review: `--force` is no longer forwarded into scaffold (it would have clobbered an adopter's root `.gitignore`). (2) NEW `/onboard` command: the brownfield analog of `/create:new-project` — detects stack, fans out Explore over the codebase, then has `architect` write `_project-architecture.md` and `doc-writer` write `_project-context.md` from reality (no brief, no vision interview), additively merges an existing CLAUDE.md (never clobbers, never calls `/init`), and chains `/review:specialize`. (3) FIX honest `node:sqlite` FTS5 detection: `memory-manager.js` previously hardcoded `sqliteSupportsFts5=false` for the node:sqlite backend, a false-negative that wrongly implied FTS5 was missing (it ships compiled-in on Node 24+, zero deps). Now probed at load time. `memory-health-check.js` warns only on genuine degradation (Node <24 without better-sqlite3). (4) FIX `memory-eval.js` runs in adopter projects (inlined query fallback when the `__tests__/` fixture is absent). (5) FIX guardrail `rm -rf` temp exemption widened (/tmp, relative tmp/, mktemp, node_modules, /var/folders/, .sandbox) so autonomous sub-agents stop stalling on scratch-dir cleanup; real project-path deletes still confirm. (6) DOCS: README + contributing skill count 26->23; README documents both greenfield and brownfield install paths and the accurate Node 24+/FTS5 zero-deps story; CLAUDE.md FTS5/Node nuance. Tests: +50 (install 42, FTS5 detection + adopter-ship guards, guardrail real-rules regression). Gate: 1500 passing.
